title: message_get does not enforce non-empty ids precondition
description: message_get documents 'ids is required (non-empty); fetching all messages is impractical' but does not enforce this. A caller passing an empty &[] will produce a Message/get request with ids:[] and receive a server-side error (likely unsupportedFilter or similar) rather than a clear ClientError::InvalidArgument at the call site. This is inconsistent with message_query, which validates its precondition and returns InvalidArgument. Fix: add a guard at the top of message_get: if ids.is_empty() { return Err(ClientError::InvalidArgument('message_get: ids must not be empty'.into())); }
